content.claim: SNI funding architecture ties per-pupil financing to classification: under task-based financing (feladatfinanszírozás), SNI pupils count as 2–3 pupils (depending on classification) for calculating teacher-post subsidies. This mechanism could theoretically incentivize over-identification, though no causal evidence links this financial structure to the documented rise.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Legal and governance lens
limitations: Causal link between funding incentive and over-identification is structural hypothesis, not empirically proven
No comparison of identification rates in systems with different financing models
Alternative drivers (diagnostic-practice changes, legal reform, genuine prevalence increase) are not quantitatively disentangled
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
